name: San Lien Technology Corp.
summary: San Lien Technology Corp. provides environment monitoring and micro vibration detection products, and system integration services in Taiwan and internationally. It offers sensor and recorder products, such as acceleration transducers, amplifiers, angle sensors, annular load cells, crackmeters, displacement transducers, inclinometer casings, load cells, network accelerometers, pressure transducers, cube visual and voice terminals, main control units, rebar strain gauges, solid load cells, spot-weldable strain gauges, strain gauges, switch boxes, tilt plates, tilt casts, tilt views, torque transducers, vibration sensors, vibration monitoring systems, weldable strain gauges, data loggers, and VW piezometers. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
